perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a group of four friends (one male, three females) dressed in heavy winter gear, reacting with astonishment and excitement against a dark night background. (2) Transitions show breathtaking time-lapse and live-action footage of the green Aurora Borealis dancing across the sky over snowy terrains. (3) The scene shifts to the group relaxing in an outdoor steaming hot spring with snow-covered rocks in the background, expressing joy. (4) Shots of the group traveling in a modern transport van, walking on glaciers with crampons, and riding in an off-road Jeep through icy water are shown in rapid succession. (5) The video concludes with the group throwing snow in the air at night under the aurora, smiling and celebrating their journey.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music with a strong beat begins immediately. A male voice speaks with high energy and excitement. (2) The audio includes layers of female laughter and enthusiastic exclamations like 'Wow' and 'Yeah' synced with visual peaks. (3) Ambient sounds of a car engine running and water splashing are heard during the driving and off-road sequences. (4) The music remains constant until the end, where it fades out with a final enthusiastic call to action from the narrator.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '當你看到極光大爆發' (When you see a big aurora burst) - Emotional hook. (2) Functional: '2025極光大爆發 / 就來阿拉斯加吧!' (2025 Aurora burst / Come to Alaska!) - Informative and persuasive. (3) Decorative: '這趟找Sky Horse 7天6夜' (This trip with Sky Horse 7 days 6 nights) - Promotional detail. (4) Functional: '一價全包' (All-inclusive), '中文導遊' (Chinese guide) - Feature highlights. (5) Functional: '出發吧!' (Let's go!) - Call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Scenic Highlights -> Service Demonstration -> Social Proof/Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 4 main friends (1 male, 3 females) and 1 male driver/guide.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A group of young adults wearing trendy winter jackets, beanies, and animal-ear headbands; also seen in swimwear during the hot spring scenes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Snowy Alaskan wilderness, frozen lakes, pine forests covered in frost, steaming thermal pools, and dark night skies illuminated by green aurora.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Low-light night photography for aurora and bright natural daylight for snow activities.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Highlight -> Detailed Features -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional travel vlog designed to market the 'SkyHorse' tour package to Alaska. It leverages the visual appeal of the Aurora Borealis and luxury/adventure activities like hot springs and glacier walks to create a 'fear of missing out' (FOMO) and encourage viewers to book the 7-day trip.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features the company logo (SkyHorse), lists specific itinerary benefits, mentions professional guides, and includes a clear call to action to book the trip.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy group reactions and selfie-style filming combined with professional scenic shots.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively targets a young demographic interested in 'aesthetic' travel and bucket-list experiences through fast editing and high-saturation visuals.
